ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient's medical record */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number for the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "restBP" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol (mg/dl) */,
  "maxHR" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "RestECG" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiographic results (0, 1, 2) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the vital signs were recorded */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the vital signs were recorded */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "oxygen_saturation" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation level */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the vital signs were recorded */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who recorded the vital signs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "output" INTEGER /* Health outcome (0 for no disease, 1 for disease) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the health outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up appointment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the outcome was recorded */,
  "recorded_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who recorded the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the medical facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the medical facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "facility_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the medical facility */,
  "facility_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the facility */,
  "facility_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility (number of patients it can handle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_facility" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-facility relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "primary_care_physician" TEXT /* Name of the primary care physician */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "reason_for_end" TEXT /* Reason for the end of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_facility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_facility_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical facility the user is associated with */,
  "user_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES medical_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the patient data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
